response: Crafted from BPA-free, food-grade stainless steel with double-wall vacuum insulation, this 24oz water bottle keeps drinks icy cold for 24 hours or steamy hot for 12—ideal for trail runs, office shifts, and weekend road trips. Its leak-proof flip spout with a secure straw lock eliminates messy spills, while the slim, smudge-resistant matte body slides seamlessly into standard car cup holders. Ditch single-use plastics with this durable, reusable pick, which includes a free cleaning brush and a lifetime warranty against manufacturing defects.
